title: Smoothness
description:
A smooth block with a dark GUI.
一個平滑的方塊與黑暗的GUI
body:
A resource pack that makes textures "smoother".

Feedback：[https://forms.gle/vfNMyg4HZgxZsgFe9](https://forms.gle/vfNMyg4HZgxZsgFe9)

**This resource pack will not support versions earlier than 1.20.1.。**
## 

一個將紋理製作成「平滑」的資源包。

反饋：[https://forms.gle/vfNMyg4HZgxZsgFe9](https://forms.gle/vfNMyg4HZgxZsgFe9)

**該資源包不會支援1.20.1以前的版本。**
